module_info.docstring:
Security tests for path traversal vulnerability fix.

This module tests the security improvements made to file upload and deletion
operations to prevent path traversal attacks.

classes.name: TestSecureFilename
classes.docstring: Test the secure_filename function against various attack vectors.

methods.name: test_basic_filename
methods.docstring: Test that normal filenames pass through unchanged.

methods.name: test_path_traversal_attacks
methods.docstring: Test that path traversal attempts are blocked.

methods.name: test_null_byte_injection
methods.docstring: Test that null byte injection is prevented.

methods.name: test_control_characters
methods.docstring: Test that control characters are removed.

methods.name: test_unicode_normalization
methods.docstring: Test that unicode attacks are prevented.

methods.name: test_drive_letters_windows
methods.docstring: Test that Windows drive letters are removed.

methods.name: test_reserved_names_windows
methods.docstring: Test that Windows reserved names are blocked.

methods.name: test_empty_filename
methods.docstring: Test that empty filenames are rejected.

methods.name: test_filename_length_limit
methods.docstring: Test that overly long filenames are rejected.

methods.name: test_leading_dots_spaces
methods.docstring: Test that leading dots and spaces are removed.

methods.name: test_valid_path
methods.docstring: Test that valid paths within base directory are accepted.

methods.name: test_path_traversal_blocked
methods.docstring: Test that path traversal attempts are blocked.

methods.name: test_symlink_traversal_blocked
methods.docstring: Test that symlink-based traversal is blocked.

classes.name: TestHandleFileUpload
classes.docstring: Test the secure file upload functionality.

methods.name: mock_file
methods.docstring: Create a mock file object for testing.

methods.name: temp_doc_path
methods.docstring: Create a temporary directory for testing.

methods.name: test_normal_file_upload
methods.docstring: Test that normal file uploads work correctly.

methods.name: test_malicious_filename_upload
methods.docstring: Test that malicious filenames are rejected.

methods.name: test_empty_filename_upload
methods.docstring: Test that empty filenames are rejected.

methods.name: test_file_conflict_handling
methods.docstring: Test that file conflicts are handled by creating unique names.

classes.name: TestHandleFileDeletion
classes.docstring: Test the secure file deletion functionality.

methods.name: temp_doc_path
methods.docstring: Create a temporary directory for testing.

methods.name: test_normal_file_deletion
methods.docstring: Test that normal file deletion works correctly.

methods.name: test_malicious_filename_deletion
methods.docstring: Test that malicious filenames are rejected for deletion.

methods.name: test_nonexistent_file_deletion
methods.docstring: Test deletion of non-existent files.

methods.name: test_directory_deletion_blocked
methods.docstring: Test that directory deletion is blocked.

classes.name: TestSecurityIntegration
classes.docstring: Integration tests for the complete security fix.

methods.name: test_attack_vectors_blocked
methods.docstring: Test that common attack vectors are blocked.

methods.name: test_legitimate_files_allowed
methods.docstring: Test that legitimate files are still allowed.
